parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, received: true, action: "normalize_digest_payload", task_id: $json.body.task_id, task_name: $json.body.task_name, run_id: $json.body.run_id, webhook_id: $json.body.webhook_id, dry_run: $json.body.dry_run, payload_keys: Object.keys($json.body.payload || {}).sort(), delivery_target: $json.body.payload?.delivery_target || null, purpose: $json.body.payload?.purpose || null, normalized: { title: $json.body.payload?.title || "Daily briefing payload", summary: $json.body.payload?.summary || "", item_count: Array.isArray($json.body.payload?.items) ? $json.body.payload.items.length : 0, source_count: Array.isArray($json.body.payload?.sources) ? $json.body.payload.sources.length : 0, items: Array.isArray($json.body.payload?.items) ? $json.body.payload.items.slice(0, 10) : [] } } }}
